title: Ladrón que roba a ladrón
writer: José María Fernández Unsáin, Ricardo Garibay, Jaime Salvador
actors: Luis Aguilar, Lorena Velázquez, Andrés Soler
plot: On-the-run outlaw Pardo and his sidekick Trompo, go into hiding in the small town of Arroyo Seco posing as a doctor and his assistant. Comic misadventures ensue.
